mnemonics: Final Means FIXED: Final classes can't be extended, final methods can't be overridden, final variables can't be reassigned
keyPoints: A final class cannot be subclassed (extended)
A final method cannot be overridden by any subclass
A final variable acts as a constant and can only be assigned once
commonMistakes: Trying to extend a class declared as final
Attempting to override a method declared as final in the parent class
Reassigning a value to a final variable after its initial assignment
